## Type of change
- [ ] `feat` — New feature
- [ ] `fix` — Bug fix
- [ ] `style` — UI / CSS only
- [ ] `refactor` — Code restructure
- [ ] `chore` — Config / dependencies

## Target branch
- [ ] `develop` (feature work)
- [ ] `staging` (QA / testing)
- [ ] `main` (production)

## Checklist
- [ ] Tested locally (`npm run dev`)
- [ ] Build passes (`npm run build`)
- [ ] No console errors
- [ ] Mobile responsive checked
